prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次分别为7137→6116→6181→5370→4517名，连续5年位次前移（竞争持续加剧），近5年累计前移约2620名；2025年基准位次约4517名，近 3年累计前移约1664名，呈加速前移态势；2021年计划32人→2022年29人→2023年29人→2024年29人→2025年33人（物理类）→2026年30人（物理类），较2025年缩招 3人（-9.1%），缩招理论上使竞争略有缓和，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第45名稳步升至2026年第42名，排名持续提 升，反映学校综合实力和声誉向好；2022年曾因校园安全事件获偏负面评价，近年无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第34（较热），综合热度约132万，张雪峰等K OL多次推荐该校，社会关注度处于中上水平；化学工程与技术获评A+（全国顶尖），化学A-，控制科学与工程A-；化工为绝对王牌专业，与招生专业中的工科试 验班（智慧化工）、化学类等高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度高（高热推荐），但 华东理工大学在内蒙古招生专业以化工、材料、生物工程为主，这些专业社会热度一般或偏劝退，可能抑制部分报考热情；内蒙古2026年总考生约15.4万人，较2025年总考生约11 .6万人大幅增加约32%，物理类考生估算约11.1万人，较2025年8.4万人增约32%，竞争显著加剧；2026年；华东理工大学位于上海 ，对内蒙古考生有较强地域吸引力，上海的城市地位和就业机会是重要加分项。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、20 26年缩招3人（缓和竞争）、内蒙古考生大幅增加约32%（加剧竞争）、学校排名稳步提升（增强吸引力）、优势学科与热门专业匹配度一般等因素，考生大增效应远大于缩招效应 ，竞争加剧占主导。预测2026年最低位次约4471名，较2025年4517名略后移46名，区间3971–4971名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were 7137 → 6116 → 6181 → 5370 → 4517, with rankings moving forward for 5 consecutive years (competition continuously intensifying), accumulating a forward shift of about 2620 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4517, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1664 positions over the past 3 years, showing an accelerating trend; enrollment plan: 32 in 2021 → 29 in 2022 → 29 in 2023 → 29 in 2024 → 33 in 2025 (Physics Category) → 30 in 2026 (Physics Category), a reduction of 3 students (-9.1%) compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition slightly but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 45th in 2021 to 42nd in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in overall strength and reputation; in 2022, there was a negative evaluation due to a campus safety incident, but no major negative public opinion in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 34th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.32 million; KOLs like Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended the school, indicating above-average social attention; Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A+ (top in the country), Chemistry A-, Control Science and Engineering A-; chemical engineering is the absolute flagship major, highly corresponding to the Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Chemical Engineering) and Chemistry Class in the enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity (highly recommended), but East China University of Science and Technology's enrollment majors in Inner Mongolia are mainly chemical engineering, materials, and bioengineering, which have average or even discouraging social popularity, potentially suppressing some application enthusiasm; Inner Mongolia's total examinees in 2026 are about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from about 116,000 in 2025, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 111,000, an increase of about 32% from 84,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; East China University of Science and Technology is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Inner Mongolia candidates, with Shanghai's city status and employment opportunities being important pluses.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the reduction of 3 students in 2026 (easing competition), the significant increase of about 32% in Inner Mongolia examinees (intensifying competition), the steady rise in school ranking (enhancing appeal), and the average match between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, the effect of the increase in examinees far outweighs the reduction in enrollment, with competition intensification dominating. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 4471, slightly shifting backward by 46 positions from 4517 in 2025, with a range of 3971–4971.

- Electronic Information Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Mechanical Class (Mechanical Intelligence Experimental Class)
- Chemistry Class (Intelligent Creation Chemistry Experimental Class/New Engineering Chemistry Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class (New Materials Experimental Class)
- Bioengineering Class
- Business Administration Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3971–4971, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (chemical engineering and chemistry are the school's flagship majors with strong academic strength), use Tier 1 majors (Computer Science Double Degree, Electronic Information Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (materials, bioengineering, business administration) as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3971), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 42nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, with steadily improving ranking; analysis from the same science group shows overall reputation stable, with relatively high Douyin popularity; the first-level discipline corresponding to Business Administration has not received an A- or above rating; Supply Chain Management is an emerging major with no direct discipline evaluation correspondence.
